ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of event (e.g., match, tournament) */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is finished */,
  "finished_provisional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is finished provisionally */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the event */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "provisional_start_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the start time is provisional */,
  "started" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event has started */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The location where the event is taking place */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators attending the event */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the referee managing the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the coach leading the team */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* The home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of Team A */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of Team H */,
  "team_a_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of Team A */,
  "team_h_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of Team H */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators attending the event */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the referee managing the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the event */,
  "total_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by both teams */,
  "total_corners" INTEGER /* Total number of corners taken by both teams */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed by both teams */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards issued in the event */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards issued in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_stats_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* The number of minutes the player was on the field */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* The number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* The number of shots on target by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* The number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* The number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* The number of times the player was offside */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* The number of tackles made by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the player's passes (as a percentage) */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* The position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* The position of the player within the team */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the team captain */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* The shirt number of the player */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* The date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* The date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., saved, missed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved */,
  "penalty_result" TEXT /* Result of the penalty */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* The minute in the event when the penalty occurred */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the referee managing the penalty */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the player who assisted in the penalty (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus_points" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Number of bonus points awarded */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the type of bonus */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the bonus points */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* The minute in the event when the bonus points were awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES team_players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_points_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each save entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player (goalkeeper) */,
  "saves_made" INTEGER /* Number of saves made */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* The minute in the event when the save was made */,
  "save_type" TEXT /* The type of save (e.g., diving, standing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saves_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES team_players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the logs */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the logs */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the logs */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
